message:
test(readme): Index manipulation methods (insert/delete/take/repeat/append)

Index has 5 manipulation methods that mirror pandas Index editing
surface. None were covered by integration tests.

Adds readme_index_manipulation_methods — reachable via prelude alone —
that asserts on a base [10, 20, 30] index:

- take([0, 2])         → [10, 30] (positional select)
- repeat(2)            → [10, 10, 20, 20, 30, 30] (length 6)
- insert(1, 15)        → [10, 15, 20, 30] (length 4)
- delete(1)            → [10, 30] (length 2)
- append([40, 50])     → [10, 20, 30, 40, 50] (length 5)
- delete(99)           → Err (out-of-bounds)

Each output's specific labels are asserted, so a regression that
returned the right length with wrong values would still fail.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.59.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
